profile: Otherworld Assault, Magical AOE poison/execute caster. Her whole kit is built on stacking [Eternal Curse] (a DoT) across multiple enemies, amplifying damage against cursed/DoT'd targets (+20%), executing low-HP foes via an Ultimate whose True DMG scales on the target's lost HP, and applying heavy Heal Reduction. She deals M.DMG through Skills/Ultimate — she is not a basic-attacker and does not crit, tank, or heal allies. Wants: DoT/curse synergy, effect-hit, True DMG and current-HP/lost-HP scaling, debuff-amplify, and AOE damage. Avoids: basic-attack, crit, single-target-only, ally-heal/shield, and self-tank mirrors.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Her own mirror and a perfect DoT engine: True DMG vs targets with DoT (every cursed enemy qualifies), and at 3★ it adds [Torment] — Heal-Down + DoT amplification stacking 8×, exactly her win condition. B-tier at 0-2★ (1 trigger), S-tier at 3★+ (4 triggers/turn + Torment).

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: Flat +8→20% ATK DMG when attacking enemies with a Debuff; she keeps the whole enemy team cursed, so this is near-100% uptime on every hit.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Passive AOE skills deal extra True DMG = % of target's current HP — her Feat/Ultimate are AOE, so this fires every turn and reinforces her execute theme.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE skills deal big extra True DMG split across targets; her multi-target Feat/Ultimate are exactly the trigger — top anima AOE damage.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skills deal +40→120% ATK True DMG to debuffed/[Infect] targets; her curses blanket the team and her skills are the delivery, so it fires reliably.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12→30% Final DMG, unconditional — the cleanest possible multiplier for a caster, always on.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Large Final DMG bonus that resets on kill — she is an AOE executioner who secures kills often, refreshing it; minor decay between kills.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add +5→20% ATK True DMG; type-agnostic, fires on every curse-spreading hit and ignores DEF.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: Ramping True DMG that pays off as she takes chip damage; at 5★ a current-HP nuke. Solid raw True-DMG scaling, no anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: +Final DMG per self-Buff (up to 30%); her Genesis grants Shield/Heavenfall buffs, giving decent uptime on a clean multiplier.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Multi-hit same-target DMG stacking up to 60%; her Feat hits 4 randoms and Ultimate 3 heroes — overlap triggers it for strong generic DPS.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG + [Lethal] (blocks resurrection) on damage; as an executioner this seals kills, and the Final DMG is always useful.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +5→20% Final DMG always on; the True-DMG bonus only fires vs Damage-Share/Transfer enemies, but the base line keeps it useful.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Flat Effect Hit Rate — directly raises the chance her 70%/90% curse applications land, but it is a small generic stat versus the damage mirrors above.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect Hit + [Fox Fire] current-HP True DMG on active attack — effect-hit helps her curse land and Fox Fire is bonus DoT, though value is modest at her stars.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Chance to add an extra [Infect] stack on infect — her curses are [Eternal Curse], not [Infect], so it won't piggyback her apply; only a generic DoT-spreader.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Extra [Bleed] on bleed application — she applies Curse, not Bleed, so no synergy with her own apply; bench DoT stat-stick.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: +10→25% Area Attack DMG; her Feat/Ultimate are AOE so it applies, but it is a flat eternal stat with no extra clause — fine filler.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +DMG vs Controlled enemies; she applies Curse/DoT rather than hard Control, so uptime depends on teammates — partial, conditional.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% — generic stat-stick that feeds her ATK-based True-DMG caps; low ceiling but never dead.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG% — small clean multiplier, a weaker epic version of Firmament; bench filler.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG stacks per attack (caps 50%); the basic-attack half is wasted on a caster, but "each attack" still counts her skills — usable, slow to ramp.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: True DMG per Debuff — her cursed targets carry many debuffs, but the clause requires a SINGLE-target skill and her kit is AOE, so it rarely triggers.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Heal + Effect Hit; only the Effect-Hit half helps her curse land, the heal does nothing for a backline caster — half-wasted.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate on a def frame; the effect-hit helps her curse land, but it is a weak anima stat-stick — marginal.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate — defensive anti-CC that lets her keep casting if focused, but contributes zero offense.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Heal-Reduction on Crit — the Heal-Down theme matches her, but it is gated behind Crit, which she lacks, so it almost never fires.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG + Spirit Armor on Feat-Skill Crit; True-DMG theme fits but it is locked behind Crit she never lands — dead trigger.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: +Ultimate DMG only; her Ultimate hits hard but is on a 4-turn cooldown, so this buffs only one cast every few turns — narrow.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG per attack; at 3★+ it favors Ultimate/Feat over Basic which suits her, but the ramp is slow and weaker than flat Final-DMG mirrors for her.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG + self-shield; the Final DMG helps a little, the shield is minor for a backliner — mediocre half-fit.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG base is fine, but the bonus requires Damage-Share state she has no control over — mostly just the flat 5→20%.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG base helps, but its main payload is Crit Rate/DMG [Hunt] stacks — she does not crit, so most of the mirror is wasted.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Huge Crit + Final DMG, but only when an ally dies and the Crit half is wasted on a non-crit hero; unreliable trigger.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore raises her M.DMG slightly, but much of her payoff is True DMG that already ignores DEF, so it overlaps poorly.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG boost that ramps via Basic Attacks at 3★; she rarely basic-attacks, so the ramp is dead and only the flat Ultimate part applies once.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack True DMG; a powerful True-DMG anima but every clause keys off Basic Attacks she never makes — effectively dead for a caster.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG ramp + on-kill basic attack at 3★; she is a skill caster, so both the ramp and the re-attack rarely trigger.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Crit + Basic-Attack focused — double anti-synergy: she neither crits nor basic-attacks.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Pure Crit Rate/DMG plus a Crit-gated dispel; she does not crit, so the entire mirror is inert.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate — dead stat on a non-crit caster.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Flat Crit DMG — useless without crits, which she never lands.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG only; her kit is AOE multi-hit, so the single-target clause almost never applies.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-Attack DMG vs low-HP — the execute theme fits, but it is single-target only and she is AOE, so the trigger is mismatched.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: DEF-based reflect when attacked; a tank effect on a frail backline caster with low DEF — negligible.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Applies Bleed to attackers when SHE is hit; she is backline and rarely targeted, and it spreads the wrong DoT type — marginal.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Applies Infect to attackers when hit; passive, off-class, and depends on her being attacked — minimal value.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK/DEF while shielded + heal at 3★; her Genesis II self-shield can trigger the ATK part, but it is a defensive anima far below her damage options.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP + lethal-hit AOE True DMG; a tank-survival mirror that only pays out when she nearly dies — wrong role for a backline executioner.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED — pure defense, no offense; off-role for a glass-cannon caster.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit-DMG-Reduction defensive stat — zero offensive value for her.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED — defensive tank stat, off-role.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Big Final DMG RED — strong for a tank, dead weight on a damage caster.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED when attacked — defensive, off-role, and needs her to be hit repeatedly.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps large incoming hits — a tank survival tool, no offense for her.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF% — a tank stat with no offensive or curse value for a backline caster.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP% — negligible survivability gain, no synergy with her damage.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Bigger flat HP% — still a pure tank stat, useless to her win condition.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: Large flat HP% (eternal) — high quality but pure tank stat, dead for her.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: Self heal + HP — sustain a glass-cannon caster does not need; no offensive synergy.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases healing done — she is not a healer; completely inert.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Self HP regen — pure sustain, no contribution to her damage or curses.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Heal anima — healing has no place in her solo-burst caster kit.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team shields at battle start — a support effect that gives her no offense; she is not the team's shielder.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Spirit Shield to an ally on first death — pure support utility with zero value for her own damage output.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED scaling with HP lost — a bruiser/tank duelist effect; she is frail backline and cannot safely sit at low HP.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED + heal/True-DMG reduction tied to Damage-Share state — a tank/damage-sink mirror; off-role for a frail backline executioner.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal amplification — she casts no heals; completely inert.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Damage-reduction support stat — defensive utility with no offensive or curse value for her.
